description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring alternating black and light gray stripes running parallel across its length. The block has a solid, monolithic appearance, with the sides and base rendered in a uniform black color, contrasting sharply with the striped top. The stripes are evenly spaced and extend from one edge to the other, giving the block a visually striking, modern look. The surface texture of the light gray stripes appears slightly rough, resembling concrete or granite, while the black stripes are matte and smooth. The block is thick and robust, suggesting it is designed to serve as a barrier or obstacle in an urban environment. There are no visible engravings, markings, or signs of significant weathering on the surfaces.
description: A thick, rectangular stone block with alternating black and light gray stripes on its flat top surface, and solid black sides. The striped pattern gives it a modern, visually striking appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the horizontal striped pattern across the top and the solid black front face.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical orientation of the stripes and the block's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with horizontal stripes and a solid black rear face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with vertical stripes and the same depth as the other side.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a decorative barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or placed directly on a leveled surface
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering or erosion; surfaces appear clean and well-maintained.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
